Title: Duplicate Contact
Description:
Currently users are not able to attach contact in different regions if the contact is not unique. For example - If same contacts is there in Siemens Germany, we won’t be able to add them in Siemens USA.  We are working on a fix to remove this restriction and allow the contacts to be attached to any account. 
Note  - This is only applicable when you are an adding a contact from any of the related entities like RFQ/SO/PO. 

If you are creating a standalone contact without any account linking, we will still throw duplicate contact error message.

Title: Quote PDF Issues
Description:

Chip 1 Exchange Asia Limited Room A2, A3, 5/F, Wing Tai Centre, 12 Hing Yip Street Kowloon, 200070 China Tel: — Email: — Web: —

All orders are non-cancelable & non-returnable*** WARRANTY: Parts are warrantied to meet fit, form and function for a minimum of 30 days unless otherwise specified in writing. ++QUOTES ARE VALID FOR 24 HOURS Unless otherwise written. 7. For all the quotes - follow the CRM column spacing in the PDF. In Apex, MPN and MFG info ic cut off and goes to the second line. The spacing for column line is very wide in Apex. Looks odd. 
8. What is this VAT: DE 814 390 475 data coming from ? This doesn't look correct.
